title: Objects, Classes, Namespaces, and Binding · Spiral Review
summary: Model a library circulation domain while tracing real Python object and attribute behavior. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an inspectable library domain model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.
Define classes and create instances while distinguishing class objects from the instances they construct.
Trace class, instance, module, and local namespaces during attribute lookup and assignment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
